short_description: Contact form emails not delivered to church office
description: Website contact form submissions stopped routing to church email after June 1st hosting maintenance.

short_description: Online donation portal returning 500 server error
description: Payment gateway API key misconfiguration causing 500 error on all donation submissions.

short_description: Building committee minutes page returns 404
description: Page URL changed during website update; old links now broken.

short_description: Prayer request form submit button not responding
description: JavaScript validation error preventing form submission in all browsers.

short_description: Choir schedule page displaying 2025 dates
description: Calendar plugin sync pulled prior year data; 2026 rehearsal schedule not showing.

short_description: VBS registration page not loading on mobile
description: Unoptimized hero image causing page timeout on mobile browsers.

short_description: Member portal password reset emails not sending
description: SMTP relay outage affecting password reset mailer; same root cause as INC0001001.

short_description: Donation receipt emails not being sent
description: Automated receipt system blocked by SMTP outage; donors not receiving confirmations.

short_description: Deacons page login credentials rejected
description: Password-protected deacons resource section not accepting valid credentials.

short_description: Building permit PDF upload throws file-size error
description: Upload limit on building committee portal was set to 5 MB; contractor PDFs exceed limit.

short_description: Women's Auxiliary meeting dates missing from calendar
description: June Women's Auxiliary events not appearing on the main church calendar widget.

short_description: Men's Fellowship event flyer PDF link returns 403
description: Incorrect file permissions on media folder blocking PDF downloads.

short_description: Easter choir recording page returns 404
description: Newsletter linked to media page that was deleted during content audit.

short_description: Newsletter signup not saving subscriber emails
description: Plugin database write failure; new subscriptions not persisting.

short_description: Baby dedication form emails not reaching pastor
description: Form submission stored in database but email notification blocked by SMTP outage.

short_description: Church website SSL certificate expiration warning
description: SSL cert for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org expires in 14 days; needs renewal.

short_description: Office printer offline - main hallway
description: Network printer outside the church office not responding to print jobs.

short_description: Fellowship hall projector not displaying HDMI input
description: Projector shows no signal when connected via HDMI to laptop for presentations.

short_description: Church Wi-Fi dropping in sanctuary during services
description: Wi-Fi signal cuts out intermittently during Sunday morning services for about 10 minutes.

short_description: Admin laptop running slow after Windows update
description: Gloria's office laptop became very slow after overnight Windows update on June 5th.
